sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_vectors (vector1 Array(Int32), vector2 Array(Int32));
SELECT arrayDotProduct(vector1, vector2) AS res FROM test_vectors;
UPDATE test_vectors SET vector2 = [7, 8, 9] WHERE vector1 = [1, 2, 3];
SELECT arrayDotProduct(vector1, vector2) AS res FROM test_vectors WHERE res > 50;
